field_values.action_summary: As the protagonist and Sola prepare to leave the deserted city, the green Martians suddenly retreat into cover as twenty large, gray-painted airships descend upon the valley.
field_values.camera_intent: Wide shots of the approaching fleet (twenty large, gray-painted airships); Medium shots of protagonist and sola reacting to Martian movement
movement_notes: Precise positioning of protagonist relative to the city exit
Synchronized timing of airship appearance in the sky with Martian retreat
field_values.transition_notes:
# Scene Contract: CH008_SC001

## Production Intent
The scene must capture the transition from a moment of departure to an immediate state of combat readiness. Visual emphasis is required on the scale of the incoming threat (twenty gray-painted airships) contrasted against the sudden, reactive movement of the Green Martian Warriors retreating into cover.

## Required Cast
- protagonist
- sola
- Green Martian Warriors (background/distant)

## Required Environments
- Deserted Martian City / Valley overlook

## Continuity Constraints
- Position of the protagonist relative to the city exit.
- Timing of the airships' appearance in the sky relative to character reactions.

## Beat List
- BT001: Protagonist and sola prepare for departure from the deserted Martian city.
- BT002: Green Martian Warriors (background/distant) suddenly retreat into cover.
- BT003: Twenty large, gray-painted airships descend upon the valley, triggering sudden alarm.
